title: Seg fault if number of elements of concatenation passed to method is too small

features.name: concatenation size mismatch with unpacked array parameter
features.description: Code should include a concatenation passed as argument to a class method where the concatenation has fewer elements than the expected unpacked array parameter
features.snippet: class Cls; function void method(int arg[3]); endfunction endclass module t; initial begin Cls c; c.method({int'(0), int'(1)}); end endmodule
